Article Title: El Niño in May-June to hit temperature and rainfall, says World Meteorological Organization
Article Text:
World Meteorological Organization warns El Niño may reduce rainfall May–July (Image used for representational purpose only)

Poll What aspect of climate change do you think El Nino will affect the most? Agriculture Water resources Energy supply Health

NEW DELHI: Predicting a climatic condition that may further aggravate adverse weather in South Asia, including India, World Meteorological Organisation Friday said an El Nino event is expected to develop as early as May-July, impacting "global temperature and rainfall patterns". Earlier, this condition was expected to develop in the second half of the monsoon season (Aug-Sept).El Nino events, which typically occur every 2-7 years and last around 9-12 months, affect temperature and rain patterns in different regions and typically have a warming effect on the global climate. Amid growing risk of El Nino, IMD has already predicted "below normal" monsoon rainfall in India.The latest monthly global seasonal climate update from WMO signals a clear shift in the equatorial Pacific where sea-surface temperatures are rising rapidly, pointing to a likely return of El Nino conditions next month.El Nino is characterised by warming of ocean surface temperatures in the central and eastern Equatorial Pacific.“For the May-June-July season, land surface temperatures are expected to be above-normal nearly everywhere,” said WMO, noting that the seasonal forecasts are vital to guide preparedness actions, especially in climate-sensitive sectors like agriculture, water resource management, energy and health.“After a period of neutral conditions at the start of the year, climate models are now strongly aligned, and there is high confidence in the onset of El Nino, followed by further intensification in the months that follow,” said Wilfran Moufouma Okia, chief of climate prediction at WMO.
Article Summary: An El Nino event is expected to develop as early as May-July, says World Meteorological Organization. Earlier, this condition was expected to developed in the second half of the monsoon season (Aug-Sept) IMD has already predicted "below normal" monsoon rainfall in India. The latest monthly global seasonal climate update signals a clear shift in the equatorial Pacific.

Article Title: Dan Ticktum calls Formula E GEN4 a “proper-looking” race car: “It is very, very, very fast”
Article Text:
Dan Ticktum (Image credit: Instagram)

Dan Ticktum introduces Formula E GEN4 car in his own style



Formula E fans react to GEN4 car



The Formula E GEN4 car has been making all the right noises since its grand reveal in France earlier this week. Drivers across the grid have been impressed with the next-generation machine, which is set to debut next season. Among them, Cupra Kiro’s Dan Ticktum shared his thoughts on the GEN4 in his own distinctive style, praising both its looks and its sheer performance.Taking to Instagram, Dan Ticktum shared a video introducing the GEN4 car and captioned it: “The new GEN4 car: very good very nice @fiaformulae #cars #speed #power.”Standing alongside the car with a drink in hand, he described it in his own words. He began: “Hello chaps and chapesses, you join me with a cocktail in the south of France. More importantly, you join me for this, which is the new Formula E car, the GEN4 car. Headline stats compared to the predecessor - that was about 450 horsepower; this is just over 800 horsepower. 0-60 in about 1.7-1.8 seconds.Permanent four-wheel drive, one of the only single-seaters ever to have permanent four-wheel drive, certainly at this level. Weight, we’re about 1,000 kilos - a bit heavier than I would have hoped, but it’s still pretty light.”Clearly impressed, he added, “I’ve seen very few cars that have shocked me on a race track before. Normally, you go to watch race cars or any cars on track and your head sort of makes a perceived, automatic movement. There are very few cars that surprise you when they go by. That was one of them. It’s got over 800 horsepower all of the time - it hasn’t got a rev range or anything. It is very, very, very f***ing fast, is how I would describe it. A few of my colleagues have already driven it. I haven’t, but I’m very much looking forward to doing so.”Comparing it to the current GEN3 Evo, he said: “I think this is a big step in the right direction for Formula E. One of the main things is how the car looks. We nicknamed the GEN3 car the ‘Dorito’. This is a proper-looking race car.”He continued, “So yeah, loads of downforce. It’s going to have two aero packages - one high downforce, one low downforce, with the low downforce setup for races to be more efficient. We’re even expecting this car, which isn’t on slicks, to be faster than Formula 2 around Monaco. Hopefully, by GEN4 or GEN5 in a couple of years’ time, when it’s on slicks, we’ll be knocking on the door of F1. It’s a proper bit of kit, and congratulations to everyone who’s made that happen because it’s f***ing cool. ”Fans also reacted to Dan Ticktum’s introduction of the GEN4 car. “At least the battery charger is better than F1,” wrote one fan. Another commented: “GEN4 giving F1 a good excuse to go back to V10s. Why bother trying to do what FE is doing better.” A third fan added: “Formula E really saw F1 struggling to nail the new generation of power units and said, ‘here, hold my beer’, and produced a monster.”Formula E is set to return with Rounds 7 and 8 in Berlin, with the double-header taking place from 1-3 May.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Formula E driver Dan Ticktum shares his thoughts on the GEN4 car on Instagram. He praises its looks and performance, saying it is'very, very, very f***ing fast' The GEN4 is set to debut next season and is expected to be faster than Formula 2.

Article Text:
Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga.(Image via Getty Images)

Dianna Russini might have hinted at her alleged affair with Mike Vrabel through her child

Mike Vrabel stepped away from NFL Draft after he reportedly got to know his pictures with Dianna Russini from 2020 will be published

Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down.Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.In the last few hours, a post of Dianna Russini about the birth of her child with her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, has sparked shockwaves across the league.The post made on 11th August, 2021, reads as, “Keep looking at my almost 4 day old son Michael while trying to figure out who are the best Michaels to ever play and coach in the NFL?”While the post seems like an innocent question related to the name of her child, it has raised eyebrows considering Mike Vrabel’s legal name is Michael George Vrabel.With the former The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini naming her first born the same name as her alleged affair partner, it has sparked outrage among fans.This has also led to Barstool Sports’ Dave Portnoy to make a post that read as, “I can’t believe that I think there is a chance Russini fathered Vrabel’s child. That is how nuts this has gotten. You just can’t name your kid the same name as the guy you are having an affair with.”To make matters worse, just a couple of hours ago, Page Six also published photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini engaging in a kiss at a New York City bar in 2020, six years before they were spotted at a hotel together.This has now raised concerns about Dianna Russini’s first born as many fans are urging her husband to get a DNA test done.However, both Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, have stayed distant from all the rumors about their marriage going downhill as their oldest son gets dragged into the drama.Interestingly, as per Page Six, the outlet did ask for the popular head coach, Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s comments before publishing their photos together from 2020.Just hours later, the New England Patriots’ head coach announced that he will be stepping away from the NFL Draft as he seeks counselling for all the things that have been happening in his life.The popular NFL insider and reporter, Dianna Russini, has stayed silent as their new pictures spark shockwaves across the league.

The New England Patriots’ head coach has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors refuse to die down. Article Title: “He felt it wasn’t authentic”: Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour
Article Text:
Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour.(Image via Getty Images)

Travis Kelce reportedly did not want to hang out with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds alongside Taylor Swift

Taylor Swift remains busy as Travis Kelce goes vocal with his professional commitments

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have had a pretty strong bond as they continue to hang out with each other’s friends and siblings.While things have taken a wrong turn between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively, it seems the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, was never a big fans of the bond they once had.A few weeks ago, as per Rob Shuter, a source revealed, “He hated the double-dating…”The source added, “He felt like it was all optics and no authenticity” and didn’t want forced hangouts or performative friendships.”To make it worse, more than Blake Lively, it seems Travis Kelce had issues with her husband, the popular Hollywood actor Ryan Reynolds as he reportedly struggled to “trust him” and maintained distance from him.However, both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained their fair share of distance from anything related to the power couple in Hollywood, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds.For now, all that the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, is focusing on is their wedding as Travis Kelce remains busy with his work commitments.While Taylor Swift has remained private in the last few days, Travis Kelce announced his podcast, New Heights, will be hosted live in Los Angeles in June 2026.The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player also opened up about NFL Draft in a recent episode as he shares the type of players that the team should recruit.The popular tight end said, “I’m just hoping for a guy that loves ball, man. I think one of the things that you just want to have when you get back into the building after a season like last year, man, you just want guys that love what they’re [expletive] doing.”Travis Kelce added, “I think it’s one of the things that I look for in these young guys when they come in, is just how infectious is your energy? I need that out of these young guys.”While star player, Travis Kelce has been public about his work life, he has not hinted at any details about his high profile wedding to Taylor Swift as they seek privacy.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams' backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season
Article Text:
Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season.(Image via X)

Green Bay Packers linked to former Los Angeles Rams ’ backup QB Jimmy Garoppolo

The Green Bay Packers’ performance in the last season dipped since 2024 as the team finished the season with 9 wins and 8 losses.As the Green Bay Packers lost the Wild Card round to the Chicago Bears, all eyes are on the next season as the team focuses on its roster.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar predicted that the Green Bay Packers could make a move for the former Los Angeles Rams’ player, Jimmy Garoppolo.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar noted in a recent report, “Green Bay still has Desmond Ridder on its roster, but Ridder has been inconsistent when give extended playing time throughout his NFL career. As the Packers look to enter the NFC playoff picture once again, they could choose to bring in a veteran passer instead.”Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar added, “Garoppolo may be a strong fit in Green Bay given his experience playing under McVay. Packers head coach Matt LaFleur was previously on McVay's coaching staff, serving as the Rams' offensive coordinator in 2017.”However, the Green Bay Packers have maintained their distance from trade talks concerning Jimmy Garoppolo.Interestingly, the Los Angeles Rams are keen to re-sign Jimmy Garoppolo after his performance suffered in the last two seasons.A week ago, as per Stu Jackson of the team's official website, the Los Angeles Rams’ head coach, Sean McVay opened up about Jimmy Garoppolo as he said, "Hey, I'd love to have Jimmy Garoppolo back with us…”The popular head coach added, "That's a big deal for us. He's earned the right to be able to take his time and do whatever he wants."But Jimmy Garoppolo has stayed silent as he deals with speculations of a potential retirement after a poor run on the field in the last two seasons.In the last season, Jimmy Garoppolo played in only three games after signing a one year deal worth $11 million with the Los Angeles Rams.Jimmy Garoppolo did not attempt a pass as his appearances were limited to kneel-downs to seal victories.In 2024, Jimmy Garoppolo missed the preseason as he was suspended from the first two games of the regular season for violating the league's performance-enhancing drug policy.For now, all eyes are on what star player, Jimmy Garoppolo chooses to do next with his career amid retirement rumors.

Article Title: ‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he doesn't drink milk, shares daily diet
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo avoids milk entirely, former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity/ Image:Instagram

Why milk is excluded from his diet

Structure of Ronaldo’s daily diet

Ronaldo maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines/ Instagram

Physical condition and recovery routine

Ronaldo’s recovery routine includes intense sauna sessions and ice baths to maintain peak fitness and longevity/Instagram

Comparison with other players’ diets

Despite milk often being touted as a superdrink rich in protein, calcium and essential vitamins, and widely used by athletes for recovery and muscle support, Cristiano Ronaldo has avoided it as part of his long-standing diet, according to his former private chef, a choice that has aligned with the discipline behind his longevity into a 25th professional season.The 41-year-old, now at Al-Nassr, is closing in on 1,000 career goals after scoring his 969th in a win last weekend. Across spells with Manchester United and Real Madrid, Ronaldo has consistently pointed to discipline in diet and recovery as central to maintaining peak physical condition over many years at the top.Ronaldo’s former chef Giorgio Barone explained that milk is completely removed from his routine, not for performance reasons alone but because of a broader view about consumption.“No milk,” Barone told Covers.com, before outlining the reasoning in detail: “Humans are the only animals that drink the milk of other animals. No other animal drinks milk after three months. Calves don’t drink milk after the age of three months. Animals don’t drink the milk of other animals.“It does not exist in nature. Only human beings continue to drink milk up to 30, 40, 50, and 60 years, and in my view it is wrong. We breastfeed from our mothers, like dogs, wolves, cows and donkeys.It is normal.“After infancy it is not normal. It is against nature.”Barone described Ronaldo’s diet as controlled but varied, built around consistency rather than restriction for its own sake.“Cristiano Ronaldo’s diet is balanced,” he said. “He eats a little bit of everything, but it’s always healthy.”He then detailed how that plays out across the day: “Starting with breakfast, he would have an avocado with coffee, eggs and no sugar. Absolutely no sugar. Lunch could be chicken, fish and always vegetables. If he needs carbohydrates, he gets them through vegetables, so he doesn’t need anything made with flour.“Nothing like pasta, bread and other types of food. In the evening, he eats light foods, usually fish or meat in the form of fillet. It’s always accompanied by vegetables.”The approach removes refined sugar entirely and avoids flour-based carbohydrates, relying instead on protein, vegetables and healthy fats.That structure is reflected in Ronaldo’s physical condition, with body fat levels maintained below 10 per cent.His routine extends beyond diet, incorporating recovery methods such as saunas and ice baths, which he and his partner Georgina Rodriguez are known to use regularly.The same discipline has been visible in public moments as well. During the 2021 European Championship, Ronaldo moved a bottle of Coca-Cola away from a press conference table and told viewers to “drink water,” a moment that wiped billions off the company’s market value.Barone also addressed comparisons with Erling Haaland, who has spoken about drinking raw milk as part of his own routine.While rejecting milk, Barone agreed with other elements of that approach, particularly the inclusion of organ meats: “I agree with [Erling Haaland’s diet of] eating the organs. The liver, heart and brain are all healthy foods. They are superfoods. Cristiano liked liver too. I love it. It’s very rich in iron, and it’s important in the diet, so for the organs, I approve, but not for the milk.”
Article Summary: Cristiano Ronaldo's former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity. Former chef Giorgio Barone says Ronaldo avoids milk entirely. The 41-year-old is closing in on 1,000 career goals at Al-Nassr. Ronaldo maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, and focuses on strict recovery routines.

Article Title: Austin Reaves Injury Update: Is Austin Reaves playing tonight? Los Angeles Lakers guard listed questionable for Game 3 vs Houston Rockets
Article Text:
Los Angeles Lakers' shooting guard Austin Reaves (Image via: Getty Images)

Austin Reaves recovery timeline explained as Los Angeles Lakers manage his return vs. the Houston Rockets

The NBA Playoffs have officially begun, and as the first round moves locations, the passion is building to a fever pitch. Six of the eight series are locked in close contests as of last night. Both the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Atlanta Hawks defeated the Knicks and Nuggets in a crucial Game 3 victory.With a 2-1 advantage, they were in a strong position to go back on the road and try to win. SG Austin Reaves of the Los Angeles Lakers is presently listed as questionable for Friday's NBA playoff game between the Lakers and Rockets on Prime Video at 8:00 p.m. ET.The Lakers have won their first two games without Austin Reaves, their main scorer, defying the odds. Since April 2, he has been out of commission. The NBA's top scorer (33.5 PPG) is predicted to miss the rest of the first round due to Reaves' devastating loss.But there is a ray of hope for Austin Reaves. Reaves is recuperating much more quickly than Doncic and is listed as questionable for tonight's Game 3 in Houston. He is expected to return for Game 5 in Los Angeles even if he misses the two-game stay in Texas.After sustaining the injury on April 2, he has missed the entire postseason thus far, but his recent improvement shows that he is getting better.The guard is making well in his rehabilitation and has already resumed playing on the floor.His predicament has emerged as one of the series' central narratives, particularly in light of the Lakers' 2-0 lead despite his absence. Depending on how he reacts, a final decision is anticipated closer to tip-off in Game 3.Given Reaves' career-high, his return is crucial to relieving pressure on the rotation. However, in order to prevent any setbacks at a crucial period of the season, the Lakers have adopted a careful approach, keeping him inactive through the early playoff games because oblique injuries are especially sensitive and quick to aggravate.Although Reaves has been out of the lineup for a few weeks due to an oblique injury, Los Angeles Lakers SG Austin Reaves is making progress toward a possible comeback. The NBA's injury report states that Reaves is formally labeled as questionable for Friday's game against the Rockets.Since the Lakers' 139-96 defeat to the Oklahoma City Thunder on April 2, the guard has been sidelined due to a Grade 2 left oblique strain. For Game 3, Reaves was upgraded to doubtful.Reaves might return in Game 3 or Game 4 if he is unable to play on Friday, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Lakers head coach JJ Redick reportedly told ESPN's Dave McMenamin that Reaves started his return-to-play program earlier this week and took part in one-on-one court work on Tuesday.Reaves has averaged 5.5 assists, 4.7 rebounds, 1.1 steals, and a career-high 23.3 points per game. The guard for the Lakers made 36.0% of his shots from beyond the arc.
Article Summary: Lakers have won their first two games without Austin Reaves, their main scorer, defying the odds. The NBA's top scorer (33.5 PPG) is predicted to miss the rest of the first round due to Reaves' devastating loss. Reaves is recuperating much more quickly than Doncic and is listed as questionable for tonight's Game 3 in Houston.

Article Title: GTA 6’s November 19 launch date to remain unchanged, gaming industry insiders confirm
Article Text:
Image via Rockstar Games

Gaming industry insiders confident about GTA 6 launch timeline remaining unchanged



“I'm pretty confident in the things we've been hearing that there's no delay incoming,”

“I think the other week we put percentages on it and I put 83 or something but I'd be now 96 per cent confident in the 19 November release date,”

“We are part of an industry that's interconnected, we do have jobs in the industry and you do hear things on the wind, I can't say too much more, but I feel like my levels of confidence have grown,”





The release date for Grand Theft Auto VI remains set for November 19. Two gaming industry insiders are also confident the release date will remain unchanged, even as anticipation around the title continues to grow. There hasn't been any new official confirmation since February, but two industry insiders have recently said development is moving forward without major problems. The update comes at a time when there is a lot of talk about delays, trailer releases, and pre-order dates. Earlier this year, Take-Two Interactive reiterated that the game was on schedule, with marketing expected to begin in the coming days and physical editions planned at launch.Speaking on the GTA VI O’Clock podcast, co-host James Jarvis indicated increasing confidence that the release timeline will hold.he said.Jarvis added.Dan Dawkins, founder of GTA VI O’Clock, echoed a similar view, citing broader industry signals.he noted.Despite these statements, there has been no new official confirmation from Rockstar Games or Take-Two since the company’s last earnings update in February, when it said the game remained on track at that time.The insiders also discussed the possible timing of a third trailer, suggesting it could arrive ahead of Take-Two’s next earnings call, expected sometime in May, though no specific date has been announced yet.
Article Summary: Gaming industry insiders confident about GTA 6 launch timeline remaining unchanged. Release date for Grand Theft Auto VI remains set for November 19. There has been no official confirmation from Rockstar Games or Take-Two since February. The insiders also discussed the possible timing of a third trailer.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El Rubius was eliminated from MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) beat Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday. Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal put on a marauding batting show to lift RCB to a daunting 250/3. RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL's history.

Article Title: Clavicular Viral Controversy: "Trans women are.....": Clavicular’s viral moment with trans women sparks fresh conversation on internet culture
Article Text:
A viral clip featuring Clavicular and trans women is gaining attention for its calm and honest tone. The conversation explores how online language and trends move across communities. Instead of conflict, the exchange highlights shared influence and mutual awareness. Viewers are engaging with its thoughtful nature, as it reflects how internet culture evolves through collaboration rather than ownership.

Clavicular and trans women share a surprising realization about online trends







The video of Clavicular, a short-video producer, is going around the Internet, yet not the reason why. There is no yelling or over-the-top drama. It is a mere, everyday talk that seems almost novel nowadays, in the age of internet, which is overflowing with content. The scene is easy-going, the tone of the narrative is straightforward, and the characters appear more concerned with conversation than combat.The message that is being addressed is the flow of the conversation. It discusses internet culture, the way people communicate with one another and the place of trends. Rather than bringing out a debate, the encounter towards curiosity. It quietly brings attention to something that a lot of people who use the internet notice but don't often say out loud. People in different communities often have a bigger impact on each other than they think.The conversation begins with a confident and lighthearted comment from one of the trans women present. She says, "You know that trans women are like the OG lip masters, right? We are very talented in the program. Like, I do the peptides, I'm on Zeta." Her tone carries a mix of pride and humor, setting a relaxed vibe at the table.Clavicular responds in a way that keeps the mood steady but adds a different angle.He says, "That is funny because you guys were using a lot of the words in like the South Korean subreddits in like 2014." It’s not confrontational. If anything, it feels like an observation. He points to how certain words and ideas may have traveled across different online spaces over time.Another voice joins in and brings the moment full circle. "Guys, we're like the OGs. I saw a couple of posts about that. We're like copying each other." That line hits in a simple but honest way. It reflects something familiar. Online culture is rarely created in isolation. It grows through sharing, borrowing, and sometimes even unknowingly repeating.That's what makes the clip so powerful. It doesn't want to make a point or win an argument. It only shows a group of people talking, listening, and figuring something out together.This moment feels different in a space where viral content often leads to fights. It reminds people that conversations can be calm, thoughtful, and still important. And sometimes, that honest silence is what makes it work.
Article Summary: A viral clip featuring Clavicular and trans women is gaining attention for its calm and honest tone. The conversation explores how online language and trends move across communities. Viewers are engaging with its thoughtful nature, as it reflects how internet culture evolves through collaboration.

Article Title: 2 youths die after motorcycle falls from flyover into drain in Delhi
Article Text:
Representative Image

NEW DELHI: Two young men riding a motorcycle died after they fell off a flyover into a drain along the Wazirabad-bound loop road near Majlis Park Metro Station in north Delhi on Sunday night, police said.The accident occurred around 9 pm on April 26 on the outer stretch of the flyover. A PCR call alerted authorities, following which a team from Bhalswa Dairy police station reached the spot. A white motorcycle was found abandoned near the drain below, indicating the riders had fallen from the elevated road into it.Enquiries revealed that the injured men had already been shifted to Babu Jagjivan Ram Memorial Hospital by passersby. However, doctors declared both “brought dead” on arrival.The deceased were identified as Saf Ali (20), a resident of Sangam Vihar in Burari, and Shahid, a resident of JJ Colony, Bawana.Police said the bodies have been preserved at the hospital mortuary for post-mortem examination. A case has been registered under Sections 281 (rash driving) and 106(death due to negligence) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita. With no eyewitnesses coming forward so far, the exact sequence of events leading to the fall remains unclear, cops said.Further investigation has been handed over to the MACT Cell of Outer North district.
Article Summary: The accident occurred around 9 pm on April 26 on the outer stretch of the flyover. A white motorcycle was found abandoned near the drain below, indicating the riders had fallen from the elevated road into it. The exact sequence of events leading to the fall remains unclear, cops said.

Article Title: Zoho founder Sridhar Vembu’s open letter to Indians in America: Your choice would be between …
Article Text:
Zoho founder Sridhar Vembu

Read Sridhar Vembu ’s open letter to Indians in US

Open letter to

Indians in America

.

--

Dear brothers and sisters from Bharat:

Like I did 37 years ago, you arrived in America with no money but with a good education and cultural heritage from Bharat. You achieved outstanding success. America was good to us. For that we must remain grateful - gratitude is our Bharatiya way.

Yet today, a significant number of Americans, may be not the majority but not too far from it either, believe that Indians "take away" American jobs and our success in America was unfairly earned.

You may think the next election will fix this, but your choice would be between people who hate our Bharatiya civilisation and people who hate civilisation itself. That is the "hard right" vs "woke left" battle. You are mere bystanders to that conflict.

Meanwhile there is one thing that is true now and will be true in the future: the respect Indians command world-wide will substantially depend on the fortunes of India herself. If India remains poor, the woke left will give us moral lectures with pity and the hard right, different moral lectures with scorn ("hellhole") and we must not confuse either with respect.

Respect in today's world, along with prosperity and security, comes from one source: a nation's technological prowess. India produces sufficient brain power to achieve that prowess but alas we exported so much of that talent, particularly to America. As we develop that prowess in India, our civilisational strength will assert itself.

As difficult as it is for many of you to contemplate this, please come back home. Bharat Mata needs your talent. Our vast youthful population needs the technology leadership you gained over the years to guide them towards prosperity. Let's do it with a missionary zeal.

Respectfully

Sridhar Vembu





Zoho founder Sridhar Vembu has shared an open letter addressed to Indians living in the United States. Posted on X (former ly known as Twitter), the letter urges “brothers and sisters from Bharat” to consider returning to India and contribute to the country’s growth. In the post, Vembu reflected on his own journey to the US decades ago and acknowledged the opportunities it provided. At the same time, he pointed to changing perceptions around immigration and jobs, saying that Indians abroad are increasingly caught in broader political debates. “You may think the next election will fix this, but your choice would be between people who hate our Bharatiya civilisation and people who hate civilisation itself. That is the "hard right" vs "woke left" battle. You are mere bystanders to that conflict,” Vembu wrote.In the post, he added that global respect for Indians will depend on India’s progress, especially in technology, and called on professionals overseas to bring their experience back to help build the country’s future.
Article Summary: Zoho founder Sridhar Vembu has shared an open letter addressed to Indians living in the United States. The letter urges “brothers and sisters from Bharat’ to consider returning to India and contribute to the country’s growth.

Article Title: Guinness World Records: London sets Guinness World Record with 440-metre tiramisu made by 100 chefs using 50,000 biscuits
Article Text:
London’s 440m tiramisu sets Guinness World Record as 100 Italian chefs use 50,000 biscuits in historic feat / Image: BBC

Making of London's world longest tiramisu

Chef Mirko Ricci ’s record comeback

A dessert with symbolism

Poll Do you believe that food can be a form of public spectacle? Yes, absolutely! Not really, it's just food.







London has quietly delivered one of the most spectacular culinary feats: a team of more than 100 Italian chefs created a 440.6-metre-long tiramisu, officially recognised by Guinness World Records as the longest ever made.The record-setting dessert was assembled inside Chelsea Old Town Hall, where rows of carefully layered tiramisu stretched across the hall in a near-unbroken line. The achievement comfortably surpassed the previous record of 273.5 metres set in Milan in 2019, marking a symbolic shift as Italy’s iconic dessert found its biggest moment outside its homeland.Officials overseeing the attempt ensured strict compliance with Guinness rules. Every section of the dessert had to meet consistent dimensions and quality standards, meaning the chefs were not simply creating something long, but something uniformly precise from beginning to end. The verification process involved detailed measurement and inspection before the record was formally confirmed.What made the record extraordinary was not just its length, but the sheer coordination required to bring it to life.The tiramisu was built over two days of continuous work, with chefs working in synchronised teams to assemble layers at speed without compromising structure.The dessert followed the classic Italian recipe, with coffee-soaked sponge biscuits layered with mascarpone cream, but on a scale rarely seen in professional kitchens. Tens of thousands of biscuits were carefully aligned to maintain continuity, while thousands of eggs were used to achieve the signature creamy texture that defines tiramisu.Maintaining uniformity across hundreds of metres proved to be one of the biggest challenges. Each segment had to match the required height and width, ensuring that the entire structure qualified as a single, continuous dessert rather than separate sections. Even minor inconsistencies could have jeopardised the record attempt, making precision just as important as ambition.At the heart of the project was Mirko Ricci, a chef with a personal connection to the record. Ricci had previously held the title before losing it to the Milan attempt in 2019, and this London event marked his determined return to reclaim it.For Ricci and his team, the achievement was about more than breaking a record. It was a celebration of Italian culinary identity on an international stage. By recreating one of Italy’s most beloved desserts at such scale, the chefs aimed to showcase both tradition and craftsmanship while connecting with a global audience.Members of the team emphasised that despite the enormous size of the dessert, the fundamentals remained unchanged. The quality of the coffee, the balance of the cream, and the care in layering received the same attention as they would be in a small, handcrafted serving.Beyond its technical achievement, the tiramisu carried symbolic meaning. The dessert was presented as a gesture of goodwill and celebration, including a decorative tribute to the British royal family, reinforcing the cultural exchange behind the event.Tiramisu, which translates loosely to “cheer me up,” has long been associated with comfort and indulgence. Its transformation into a record-breaking installation reflects a broader trend in which food becomes a form of public spectacle, blending tradition with large-scale visual impact.Events like this highlight how culinary culture is evolving. What was once a simple Italian dessert has now become a global icon capable of drawing crowds, headlines and international attention. London’s record-breaking tiramisu is not just about size; it represents collaboration, cultural pride and the growing intersection between gastronomy and performance.
Article Summary: A team of more than 100 Italian chefs created a 440.6-metre-long tiramisu. The record-setting dessert was assembled inside Chelsea Old Town Hall. It comfortably surpassed the previous record of 273.5 metres set in Milan in 2019.

Article Title: Rambling hurts your case: Immigration lawyer reveals how US visa decisions are made and why they are denied
Article Text:
Visa officers deny applications because they are trained to spot inconsistencies, an immigration lawyer explained.



Decision is already made but it's not final

There is no benefit of doubt

Rambling, over-explaining hurt a case

One reason why visa applications get denied

Sound credible not rehearsed







As US visas are getting difficult to get even for tourism purpose, immigration lawyer Andrea Szew said the approval process does not work the way people think it works. Applicants think they were not given enough time to explain their case and they got rejected, but visa officers are trained to spot inconsistency and they have to make a quick decision as they don't have the time to read the intention of an application, Szew explained in her YouTube video.Here are 5 things to know:Andrea explained that people think their case begins when they reach the interview window. But by that time, the visa officer has checked the DS-160, travel history, prior visa applications, prior visa notes of the person. They have already formed a decision but it's not final. Their questions are to confirm what they see in the application. Even if the case is simple, they are trained to ask if the person has any reason to come back to their country.The visa officers are trained to look for patterns, consistency, credibility, logic and risk, If something is unclear, it does not get a benefit of doubt, it gets treated as a concern. The visa officers do not have the time to investigate every single case, as they are interviewing even 100 applicants a day. They ask targeted questions to get key information.Andrea explained that many people think they did not get a chance to explain their case as the visa officer asked only one question.The visa officers are not looking for long answers. In fact, rambling and over-explaining hurt a case. They are looking for short, direct and aligned answer.Andrea said that it is not that applicants are denied visa because they were lying. One reason why visa applications get denied is inconsistency or mismatch between the answer and the application. The visa officer is not looking for a perfect answer. The decision is made on overall impression, Andrea explained.The applicant must know the application properly but they need to sound credible and confident, not rehearsed. Anticipate key questions and answer confidently, Andrea advised.
Article Summary: Visa officers deny applications because they are trained to spot inconsistencies, an immigration lawyer explained. Applicants think they were not given enough time to explain their case and they got rejected. One reason why visa applications get denied is inconsistency or mismatch between the answer and the application.

Article Title: Quote of the day by Rosa Parks: "You must never be fearful about what you are doing when it is right."
Article Text:
Quote of the day by Rosa Parks (Image source: Wikipedia)

"You must never be fearful of what you are doing when it is right,"

Quote of the day by Rosa Parks



"You must never be fearful about what you are doing when it is right."

Understanding the meaning of the quote by Rosa Parks



Why fear often affects decision-making



The role of moral clarity in reducing fear



How this quote applies in everyday life



The broader importance of acting without fear

A timeless message across generations



Final takeaway from the quote









Rosa Parks's quote,are still very important today. This quote doesn't talk about a single event or opinion. Instead, it talks about a general idea of how people act, make decisions, and know what's right and wrong. People in different societies and times often have to choose between what is easy and what is right. This statement makes it clear how important it is to stand your ground in these kinds of situations, even if you're scared or under pressure. It is a message that is easy to understand and applies to both everyday life and bigger historical movements.The quote basically says that fear shouldn't stop someone from doing something if they know it's right. There are many things that can make you afraid, like social pressure, not knowing what will happen, or the possible effects. The message, on the other hand, says that fear should not be more important than doing the right thing.This notion extends beyond significant life choices. It also applies to small things we do every day. The principle is the same whether you are telling the truth, helping someone in need, or standing up to unfair treatment.The quote is about how courage and morality are related. It shows that people are often sure of what they do because they know they are right.Fear is a normal reaction for people. It is very important for keeping people safe from harm. But in a lot of cases, fear isn't about getting hurt physically; it's about social or emotional effects. People might be afraid of being judged, missing out on chances, or getting criticised.This fear can stop people from doing what they think is right sometimes. For instance, someone might not speak up in a tough situation because they don't know how the other person will react. The quote talks about this by telling people to trust what they know is right and wrong instead of their fears.It shows that fear is only temporary, but the effects of actions based on integrity can last a long time.The quote's main point is that you should be sure of what's right. When a person knows what they believe and what they value, it's easier for them to act without thinking about it. This makes things clearer, which helps people feel more sure of themselves.Just because you know what's right doesn't mean making decisions is always easy. Even when you do the right thing, you may still face problems. But knowing what is right gives you a strong base that makes it easier to deal with those problems.This is why the quote talks about both courage and how it relates to being right.You can see the meaning of this quote in many situations that happen every day. It doesn't just happen during important events or times in history. Instead, it can be used for everyday choices that are easy to make.People may need to report mistakes or speak up about unfair practices at work. Students in schools may have to stand up to bullying or help someone who is being treated unfairly. People in families and communities may have to make choices that are fair and honest, even when they are hard.In all of these situations, the same rule applies. If someone thinks what they're doing is right, they shouldn't let fear stop them from doing it.People who do the right thing instead of the easy thing help make the world a more responsible and fair place. This is true for both individuals and groups.People in communities get along better when they are willing to speak up, help each other, and do the right thing. Not being afraid of doing these things helps build trust and responsibility. This makes systems and relationships stronger over time.The quote illustrates this overarching concept by demonstrating that individual actions, when driven by courage and righteousness, can yield significant effects.The quote is from a specific person in history, but its meaning is not limited to that person or time. The idea of facing your fears to do the right thing is important in all cultures and times.This message is even more important now that people are always hearing different points of view and feeling pressure. It tells people to trust their own sense of right and wrong instead of letting other things affect them.This is why people still talk about and understand the quote a lot. It's easy to remember because it's simple, and it's important to use because of what it means.The quote, "You should never be afraid of what you're doing when it's right," has a clear and useful message that can be used in everyday life. It says that fear is a normal response, but it shouldn't stop someone from doing the right thing.The quote gives advice that is both easy to understand and useful to a lot of people by focusing on moral clarity, confidence, and making decisions that are easy to understand. It reminds us that you don't always need to be in a tough situation to be brave. It usually starts with small, everyday choices that are based on what is right.
Article Summary: "You must never be fearful of what you are doing when it is right" is the quote of the day by Rosa Parks. The message is that fear should not be more important than doing the right thing. People in different societies and times often have to choose between what is easy and what is right.
